description: Style NoteThese lotto shoes with sturdy soles, bold overlays and style highlights is a closet essential. Class up your off-duty ensemble with this sleek shoe. Wear it with fitted denims and a T-shirt.Product DetailsNavy blue blunt toed shoe with colourful midfoot overlay and perforationsCentral lace-ups, padded innerUpper adhered to the outsoleNubs and grooves on the TPU outsoleMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust
